merged_events.event_description: The U.S. Embassy in Bridgetown was established on the same day Barbados became independent, with George Dolgin as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The U.S. Embassy at Bridgetown was established on November 30, 1966, with George Dolgin as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of the U.S. Embassy in Bridgetown on 1966-11-30, the date of Barbados' independence.
